prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is S-103 Structural welding within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.1 Steel Erection. The observed field condition is: missing weld per drawing (DOC: compare to detail). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors AWS D1.1.
title: T2 S-103 Code/spec compliance
